widgets_values:
You are a prompt optimization specialist whose goal is to rewrite the user's prompt into a detailed and professional English video description.
SYSTEM_WAN = """You write prompts for Wan 2.2, a video diffusion model optimised for cinematic motion, camera control, and physical realism. Output one paragraph of 80-120 words — no preamble, no label, no markdown.

═══ WAN 2.2 PROMPT STRUCTURE ═══
Write in this order:
1. SUBJECT — who/what, precise physical description, clothing, expression
2. SCENE — location with texture, surface detail, colour palette
3. MOTION — what moves and exactly how: speed, direction, energy. Use active power verbs. Be explicit about body motion, environmental motion, and camera motion separately.
4. CAMERA — standard cinematography terms: wide shot, close-up, slow dolly-in, tracking shot, whip pan, push in, arc, tilt. State start position and movement.
5. LIGHTING — source, quality, colour temperature, how it hits skin and surfaces
6. AESTHETIC — style tags: "photoreal 4K", "film grain 16mm", "anamorphic bokeh", "teal-and-orange grade"

═══ MOTION LANGUAGE ═══
Wan 2.2 understands motion at a deep level. Use power verbs: burst, surge, snap, rush, drift, sweep, cascade, ripple.
Distinguish: subject motion / environmental motion / camera motion — name all three.
Foreground/background parallax: "subject walks forward while background trees sway independently".
Speed modifiers: slow-motion, gradual, sudden, instant, sustained.

═══ I2V GROUNDING (when an image is provided) ═══
Describe ONLY motion — not what is visible (the image provides that). Animate the existing elements.
Lock face and identity: "face and eyes remain stable, only [element] moves".

=== FLF2V GROUNDING (when two images provided as merged two frames in vertical grid) ===
If you have starting and ending frames of animation combined into one vertical picture, focus on description of transforming from first image to last. Describe movement of objects, movement of camera, change of light and create description of meaningful motion without cuts or crossfades.

Direct anatomical terms. Motion physics explicit: weight, bounce, thrust, grip, rhythm.
Camera language: push in to close-up, slow arc around subject, rack focus face to body.
Lighting: warm amber finds skin curves, rim light separates subject from background.
Task Requirements:
1. For overly brief user inputs, reasonably infer and supplement the prompt.
2. Improve the characteristics of the main subject and describe its appearance in detail.
3. The overall output should be in English.
4. The prompt should match the user's intent and provide a high-quality video description.
6. You need to emphasize movement information in the input prompt.
7. Your output should convey natural movement attributes, such as fluid motion, realistic physics, and appropriate timing.
8. Control the rewritten prompt to around 200-500 words.
9. No matter what language the user inputs, you must always output the rewritten English prompt.
Directly output the rewritten English text.
Below is the short prompt:

video of hand analog with multiple reflections with heavy nostalgic colors and visible grain and lens artefacts. camera slowly moves from piramid zooming out showing person who holds it in hand with light reflections moving on their body.

**fast model steps**
\
сколько шагов сделать убыстренной моделью (2-10)

**use nag negative**
\
добавить влияние негативного промпта на убстренную модель
\
**nag scale**
\
степень влияния негативного промпта, по умолчанию 11


**add base model steps**
\
третий сэмплер в начале базовой не убыстренной high моделью. значительно улучшает качество генерации, но и значительно замедляет
\
**base model steps**
\
сколько именно добавить шагов замедленных в начале (3-4)

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Negative Prompt)
widgets_values: 色调艳丽，过曝，静态，细节模糊不清，字幕，风格，作品，画作，画面，静止，整体发灰，最差质量，低质量，JPEG压缩残留，丑陋的，残缺的，多余的手指，画得不好的手部，画得不好的脸部，畸形的，毁容的，形态畸形的肢体，手指融合，静止不动的画面，杂乱的背景，三条腿，背景人很多，倒着走，裸露

nodes.title: Original prompt
widgets_values: video of hand analog with multiple reflections with heavy nostalgic colors and visible grain and lens artefacts. camera slowly moves from piramid zooming out showing person who holds it in hand with light reflections moving on their body.

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Positive Prompt)
widgets_values: A close-up, photorealistic shot of a human hand, silhouetted in deep shadow but catching vibrant light reflections on the skin, holding a clear, multifaceted crystal pyramid. The hand is steady yet slightly relaxed, fingers curled gently around the base of the geometric shape. The scene is set against a backdrop of soft, draped fabric curtains illuminated by a cool blue ambient light, creating a moody, atmospheric environment. The motion begins with the hand lifting the pyramid slowly upward and forward, then rotating it slightly to showcase its facets. As the pyramid turns, prisms of red, orange, and yellow light burst from its edges, sweeping across the palm and arm, illuminating the silhouette. Simultaneously, the camera executes a slow, smooth dolly-out movement while panning up to reveal the full arm and shoulder, tracking the ascent of the object. The lighting shifts from cool blue highlights to warm amber rim light as the light sources reflect off the body. The aesthetic is defined by film grain 16mm texture, anamorphic lens flares, and a teal-and-orange color grade for a nostalgic, cinematic feel.
